home.heroSubtitle: An exciting and artistic city on the Black Sea coast
home.aboutDesc: Burgas is the fourth largest city in Bulgaria, located on the Black Sea coast. A city of festivals, parks, and maritime culture.
home.postcardQuote: Where the Black Sea meets ancient history
home.newsletterTitle: Stay updated with the best of Burgas

explore.title: Explore Burgas
explore.description: Discover ancient landmarks, sun-kissed beaches, lush sea gardens, and the vibrant cultural soul of Bulgaria's Black Sea jewel
explore.noPlaces: No places found in this category
explore.whyTitle: Why Burgas Will Steal Your Heart
explore.whySubtitle: A city that surprises at every turn — from the whisper of waves to the roar of festivals
explore.highlight1Desc: Walk through ancient Roman baths at Aquae Calidae, marvel at Thracian treasures, and discover a city where every cobblestone tells a story.
explore.highlight2Desc: The Sea Garden stretches along the coast like a green embrace. Three lakes surround the city, home to pelicans, herons, and breathtaking sunsets.
explore.highlight3Desc: Spirit of Burgas, Sand Fest, Flora — this city lives for art. Street performers, open-air galleries, and music fill the summer nights.
explore.tipText: Start your morning with a walk through the Sea Garden to the beach, grab a fresh banitsa from a local bakery, then head to Alexandrovska Street for the best shopping and people-watching in town.
explore.ctaEventsDesc: Don't miss the concerts, exhibitions, and festivals lighting up the city
explore.ctaPlanDesc: Find the best hotels, restaurants, and local transport for your stay

plan.title: Plan Your Adventure
plan.description: From boutique seaside hotels to fresh Black Sea cuisine, buzzing nightlife, and scenic coastal routes — craft your perfect Burgas experience
plan.noServices: No services found in this category
plan.tipsSubtitle: Everything you need to know for a seamless and unforgettable Burgas experience
plan.tip1Desc: June through September for beach lovers and festival goers. May and October for mild weather, fewer crowds, and lower prices. The Sea Garden is magical year-round.
plan.tip2Desc: Order the fresh catch of the day at any seaside restaurant — grilled sprats, Black Sea mussels, and shopska salad are absolute musts. Pair it with a local Thracian wine.
plan.tip3Desc: The city center is wonderfully walkable. Rent a bike along the Sea Garden promenade, or hop on a bus to reach the stunning beaches of Sarafovo and Kraymorie.
plan.ctaExploreDesc: Landmarks, beaches, museums — explore everything Burgas has to offer
plan.ctaEventsDesc: Concerts, theater, festivals — check out the latest happenings
plan.ctaDealsDesc: Special offers and packages to make your trip even better
